meta.poznamky: Mutace 2-3-003. H: levá svislá 60px dolů, PenUp zpět, forward 40px vpravo, pravá svislá 60px dolů, PenUp na střed (30px), příčka 40px vlevo. Start: x=50, y=220, uhel=270.

cms.task_text: Nakreslete [hlp]písmeno H[/hlp]. Obě svislé části jsou 60 px, příčka uprostřed je 40 px.
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
